data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding data minimization in public views.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario 'Staff data minimization in public views', but there is no direct evidence or API interaction provided that confirms this functionality is implemented or tested. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address the specific requirement of data minimization in public views, leading to an inconclusive status. Without concrete evidence or API reads, it is impossible to determine if the expected outcome is met.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of data minimization in public views.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the data minimization requirement.
